1.0_BuildSampleManifest.py.stderr: UnicodeEncodeError: 'charmap' codec can't encode character '\u2713' in position 0: character maps to <undefined>

issues.description: Windows console encoding error with checkmark character (\u2713)
issues.impact: Script prerequisites pass but fails to print success message on Windows
issues.workaround: Use [OK] instead of ✓, or set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8

1.0_BuildSampleManifest.py.notes: Prerequisites check passed, but Unicode error on print statement prevents clean exit

recommendations.issue: UnicodeEncodeError on Windows with checkmark character
recommendations.fix: Replace print('\u2713 All prerequisites validated') with print('[OK] All prerequisites validated') or use sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8')
Review dry-run print logic - appears to print success message twice

conclusion: Dry-run validation completed. 1.1 passes unconditionally. 1.2, 1.3, 1.4 correctly fail on missing prerequisites (expected on fresh run). 1.0 has Unicode issue on Windows that should be fixed. All dependency validation logic works correctly.
